ddls:
CREATE TABLE "symbol_definitions" (
  "symbol_definition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symbol definition */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider associated with the symbol */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the symbol */,
  "fully_qualified_name" TEXT /* Fully qualified name of the symbol */,
  "kind" INTEGER /* Type of the symbol (e.g., defined, imported) */,
  "accessibility" INTEGER /* Accessibility level of the symbol */,
  "defining_file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file where the symbol is defined */,
  "location_row" INTEGER /* Row location of the symbol in the file */,
  "location_column" INTEGER /* Column location of the symbol in the file */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the symbol */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the symbol */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the symbol was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the symbol */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the symbol was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_definition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbol_definitions_defining_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("defining_file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbol_definitions_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contacting the provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the provider's website */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the provider entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the provider entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the provider entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the provider entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file in the repository */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the file was last modified */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., YAML, JSON, XML) */,
  "version_control_url" TEXT /* URL to the version control system for the file */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the file entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the file entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the file entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the file entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the project started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the project entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the project entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, manager, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the symbol */,
  "symbol_definition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the symbol was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client making the access */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the log entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "symbol_definition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol definition */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the symbol */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when this version was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_symbol_definition_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_definition_id") REFERENCES symbol_definitions ("symbol_definition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_levels" (
  "access_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access level */,
  "access_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the access level (e.g., read, write) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access level */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access level */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access level was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the access level */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the access level was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbol_access" (
  "symbol_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access mapping */,
  "symbol_definition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol definition */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_level_id" INTEGER /* ID of the access level */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access mapping */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the access mapping was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the access mapping */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the access mapping was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbol_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbol_access_symbol_definition_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_definition_id") REFERENCES symbol_definitions ("symbol_definition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbol_access_access_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("access_level_id") REFERENCES access_levels ("access_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbol_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symbol type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the symbol type (e.g., configuration, platform) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the symbol type */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the symbol type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the symbol type was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the symbol type */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the symbol type was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbol_kinds" (
  "kind_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each kind of symbol */,
  "kind_name" TEXT /* Name of the kind */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the kind */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the symbol kind */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the symbol kind was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the symbol kind */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the symbol kind was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("kind_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_symbols" (
  "project_symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-symbol mapping */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "symbol_definition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the symbol definition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project-symbol mapping */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the project-symbol mapping was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the project-symbol mapping */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the project-symbol mapping was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_symbols_symbol_definition_id FOREIGN KEY ("symbol_definition_id") REFERENCES symbol_definitions ("symbol_definition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_symbols_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
